name: Ailite Dry Cabinet Wooden GPG-160L
description: AILITE Dry Cabinet is a special tool or cabinet box that can be used as a storage medium for your photography equipment such as camera bodies, lenses, batteries, filters, vertical grips, flashes and many more.

features.Key Features :: INSIDE : 45 x 40 x 150 CM | CAPACITY : 160 Liters | MODEL : GPG-160L | POWER : 24W | DRAWERS : 4 Drawers | HUMIDITY CONTROL RANGE : RH25~65% Semi-Conductor Dehumidifier | POWER SOURCE : 100v-220v -50hz
